title: Better Tools and Armor
description: Not just another overpowered tool-pack mod! Encourages exploration, Overhauls progression, and Emphasises player choice!
body:
**VERSION 13.0 AVAILABLE NOW!!** *** ## Overview **Better Tools and Armor** is not just another overpowered toolpack mod. It aims to overhaul Minecraft's equipment progression system by emphasising player choice and exploration. BT+A also adds a myriad of Quality-of-Life features, including new Building Blocks, Crafting Recipes and Potions with useful effects! **Important Information:** * [**Curios API**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/curios/files?page=1&pageSize=20&gameVersionTypeId=1) is **required** for the latest version * [**Just Enough Items**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20&gameVersionTypeId=1) is required for v12.0 and below, and **highly recommended** for all versions! * The latest version of the mod is for Minecraft **1.20.1 only!** * The 1.20.1 version works on both Forge and NeoForge * The 1.20.1 version is no longer being updated. The next release will be for Minecraft 1.21. This will take a while as **a lot** of the mod's code will have to change. * More versions available on [**CurseForge**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-tools-and-armor) ## Features As of v13.0, Better Tools and Armor adds: * **Over 500** new Items * **Over 120** new Blocks * **6** new Ores * **23** new Tool Sets and Armor Sets, most having a special ability. * **16** standalone Armor pieces with special effects. * **20** Charms with unique effects, equippable using the Curios API * **85** new Advancements * **11** new Potions, including **5** new Potion Effects * **9** new Enchantments * A new **Bow**, with **16** different upgrades * A new type of **Ranged Weapon**: Magic Staffs - there are **5** of them! * A new **Tool Type**: Daggers - there are over **30** of them! * A new **Villager Profession**: The Jeweller *** ## New Ores Many new ores and resources are added, each spawning in unique locations. * **Mixed Ore** - Common below y=40. Drops a random resource when mined. * **Ruby** - Uncommon between y=-32 and y=32. * **Sapphire** - Generates above y=100 in large veins. Use Sapphires to craft gear which can freeze your opponents! * **Topaz** - Spawns from y=0 to y=75 in Desert biomes. Use Topaz gems to make some electrifying new gear! ![Overworld ores](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/506294/description_9f8d9d9a-69b8-406c-b395-c92d51ba1bbf.png) ![Ruby, Sapphire and Topaz tools & armor](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/506294/description_2c0569bb-de88-40b5-9991-ae4139a2a233.png)
Ruby, Sapphire and Topaz gear
  • Ruby Tools - Very fast attack and mining speeds with much better durability than Gold.
  • Sapphire Weapons - Can freeze opponents in place, allowing them to be shattered for extra damage.
  • Sapphire Tools - Enchanted with Silk Touch by default.
  • Topaz Weapons - Attacks can cause electric chains which damage other nearby mobs.
  • Topaz Tools - Increased loot drops from blocks mined.
* **Nether Diamond** - Spawns in Basalt Deltas in the Nether. Use them to craft gear on par with Diamond which sets enemies on fire! * **Ender Titanium** - Spawns rarely inside End Islands. Use Ender Titanium to upgrade Netherite gear into the most powerful tools and armor in the mod! Find the Ender Titanium Smithing Template in End City loot chests. ![Nether and End ores](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/506294/description_3a07c33e-2718-452c-9b12-41f81be9413b.png) ![Nether Diamond and Ender Titanium tools & armor](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/506294/description_9c1d98e0-0f8f-404d-a10b-a593a1a00e6b.png)
Nether Diamond and Ender Titanium gear
  • Nether Diamond Weapons - Sets enemies on fire.
  • Nether Diamond Tools - Smelts raw ore drops, or allows plants to drop Charcoal.
  • Ender Titanium Tools - End-related special effects, e.g. increased damage in the End.
  • Ender Titanium Armor - Each piece has an End-related effect, and when a full set is worn, it can save you when falling into the void!
*** ## Crystallite **Crystallite** is the largest feature in Better Tools and Armor, found underground in large clusters, similar to Amethyst Geodes. Crystallite Gems can be used to craft equipment which is more powerful than Netherite! ![Crystallite](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/506294/description_b1892ec0-6eea-4fd0-94a8-f76d43bab6dc.png) Every piece of Crystallite gear can be upgraded with an Elemental Crystal to gain a special ability. There are 16 different upgrades for every piece of equipment! Each upgrade is part of a set which has a theme based on the material it is crafted with. Some upgrades make gear more powerful, while others extend its utility. **The choice is yours!** ![Crystallite Upgrades](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/506294/description_89fbb0f0-9548-4af9-b6e1-d573a369335b.png)
Crystallite Upgrade Highlights
  • Magnetic Pickaxe - Block drops are teleported straight to you
  • Tools with increased reach distance
  • Armor which increases movement speed
  • Echolocation Pickaxe - Locates the nearest ore vein
  • Swarm Sword - Consecutive hits deal more damage
  • And many more!
Crystallite Upgrades are done using a Smithing Table, so you can change between any upgrade at any time, while keeping all enchantments. Upgrading uses the Crystallite Upgrade Smithing Template, which is obtained by trading with the new **Jeweller Villager**. This guy also sells Crystallite Charms, which provide minor buffs when equipped via Curios API. ![Jeweller Villager](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/506294/description_0097aecf-4420-48c9-bd31-aac1def50bf6.png) Crystallite can also be crafted into a more powerful **Bow**, which can be upgraded in the same way! ![Crystallite Bows](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/506294/description_8ff5d5a4-e82e-42a3-b787-7f7dd457a340.png)
Crystallite Bow Highlights
  • Amethyst Upgrade - Arrows which home in on nearby mobs
  • Ruby Upgrade - Faster fire rate
  • Sculk Upgrade - Arrows which pierce through all targets
  • Nether Diamond Upgrade - Explosive arrows!
*** ## Daggers Every tool set, including the vanilla ones, now contains a Dagger. Daggers are short swords which deal less damage and have less durability, but they attack much faster and are easier to craft. Other than that, they have the exact same capabilities as the equivalent Sword in their toolset. ![Daggers](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/506294/description_afdcc5d5-841b-437f-a1b4-e5ba2ac36750.png) *** ## Wooden Armor Stripping logs using an Axe now drops Bark, which can be used to craft Wooden Armor. This serves as a great early-game alternative to Leather Armor. Bark can also be used to turn stripped logs back into regular logs, saving you from all those annoying times you've accidentally stripped a log which is part of your house! ![Wooden Armor and Bark](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/506294/description_30f2c9b9-ec63-494d-aec4-a6d6eb4eeb0c.png) *** ## Progression Tree Better Tools and Armor changes the progression tree of Minecraft significantly: ![Better Tools and Armor progression tree](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/506294/description_870f99a2-f564-4ae2-b875-a52106f309a4.png) *** ## Effect Armor Effect Armor are a set of standalone armor pieces which grant a potion effect when worn. There are 11 different kinds, and each one can be upgraded with Iron and Diamond to increase the effect duration and level. An Energy Vial (equipped via Curios API) is used to power the armor, and to toggle effects on/off. Learn more in the [**Knowledge Base**](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1D9QeXDJwbP624e433IQZ1Bo4KJmBZImnvJVf0wcGmL8/edit?usp=sharing) ![Effect Armor](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/506294/description_3ae3d149-b26c-461f-90bf-7f08ec9b2703.png)
Effect Armors in the order shown
  • Golden Carrot Hat - Night Vision
  • Hearty Shirt - Absorption
  • Magma Chestplate - Strength
  • Ruby Leggings - Haste
  • Crystal Leggings - Swift Swim
  • Gilded Blackstone Leggings - Fire Resistance
  • Sugar Boots - Speed
  • Rabbit Boots - Jump Boost
  • Phantom Boots - Slow Falling
  • Glass Armor - Invisibility (Armor with invisible texture)
*** ## Magic Staffs ![Magic Staffs](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/506294/description_890e5ced-91eb-4794-9cb5-61ff03b2e9df.png) Magic Staffs are a new kind of ranged weapon, crafted using Crystallite. They shoot projectiles with various magic effects, and they can be enchanted to become more powerful.
Magic Staffs (left to right)
  • Fire Staff - Sets enemies on fire for a while. When enchanted, causes an explosion.
  • Ice Staff - Freezes enemies for a while. When enchanted, projectiles have an area of effect.
  • Lightning Staff - Summons lightning on the target.
  • Warden Staff - Shoots a powerful sonic boom which travels through walls.
  • Guardian Staff - Damages all mobs within a radius of the user.
*** ## Enchantments Many new enchantments are added, for all kinds of equipment. ![Enchantments](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/506294/description_b221d84a-3e97-4740-a6d8-a8be0c12bc03.png)
Enchantments List
  • Smelting Touch (Pickaxes) - Smelts ore drops
  • Experienced (Sword, 3 levels) - Increases XP drops from mobs
  • Curse of Karma (Sword) - When you hit mobs, your sword hits back
  • Freeze Shot (Bows, 3 levels) - Arrows can freeze the opponent
  • Thunder Shot (Bows, 3 levels) - Arrows can strike the opponent with lightning
  • Life Aura (Chestplates) - Makes your attacks stronger when at full HP
  • Desperation (Chestplates) - Makes your attacks stronger when at low HP
  • Swift Cast (Magic Staffs, 3 levels) - Decreases cooldown time between shots
  • Ensorcellation (Magic Staffs, 3 levels) - Amplifies the effects of staff projectiles
*** ## Potions Better Tools and Armor adds a variety of potions, including some new and upgraded Potion Effects. ![Potions](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/506294/description_e7df70ab-a4fd-4fe9-b02c-2a4de9811aa8.png)
Potions (left to right)
  • Luck - This vanilla effect finally has a use! Having the Luck effect gives a chance for Ore drops to double.
  • Decay - Now you can harness the Wither effect by brewing this potion using the Wither Rose!
  • Karma - Having this effect acts kind of like the Thorns enchantment. When mobs attack you, they will also take damage.
  • Double Jump - Allows you to jump again in mid-air!
  • Swift Swim - Increases swimming speed, without the need for Dolphin's Grace.
  • Criticality - Increases damage dealt by critical hits.
  • Ore Vision - Shows particles on nearby ores, highlighting them in the darkness.
Some new potions give one-off effects, rather than a long-lasting potion effect. These are known as Utility Potions and they can be found in various loot chests in vanilla structures, such as Mob Spawners.  ![Utility Potions](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/506294/description_c7f5ecaf-0b21-4684-883a-cb1b64c53752.png)
Utility Potions (left to right)
  • Potion of Experience - Instantly gives 1 XP level.
  • Potion of Ascension - Teleports you up to the next solid floor.
  • Potion of Descension - Teleports you down to the next ceiling.
  • Recall Potion - Teleports you to your spawn
  • Potion of Lost Souls - Teleports you to your last death location.
  • Mystic Potion - Brewing ingredient for other Utility Potions. Gives a random effect when consumed.
*** ## Building Blocks Better Tools and Armor adds a variety of metal building blocks, coming in 20 different colours. These all come with Slab, Stair, Wall and Trapdoor variants. They are great for making trains with the Create Mod! ![Metallic Building Blocks](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/506294/description_6e1e38c5-2dcf-4016-be4e-ef592dcf02ca.png) *** ## Finding out More Some highlights of Better Tools and Armor have been shown on this page, and in the **[Images Tab](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-tools-and-armor/screenshots)**, but this barely scratches the surface of what's available! For more information in-game, I highly recommend installing [**Just Enough Items**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20&gameVersionTypeId=1). This allows recipes to be viewed for every item and block in the mod. It also allows you to view Information screens about certain items, giving more details about how they work. Here is an example, accessed by pressing \[R\] while hovering on the new **Bark** item. ![JEI Information](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/506294/description_466f4dce-e997-4a0b-8d35-958c082d2795.png) *** ## Need Help? For any information about BT+A which is not covered in-game, please refer to the **[Knowledge Base](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1D9QeXDJwbP624e433IQZ1Bo4KJmBZImnvJVf0wcGmL8/edit?usp=sharing)** - this **76-page** Google Doc contains detailed information about **every feature in the mod**. Of course, if you are still stuck, you can always leave a comment and I will reply! [https://docs.google.com/document/d/1D9QeXDJwbP624e433IQZ1Bo4KJmBZImnvJVf0wcGmL8/edit?usp=sharing](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1D9QeXDJwbP624e433IQZ1Bo4KJmBZImnvJVf0wcGmL8/edit?usp=sharing) *** ## Using the Mod Feel free to use Better Tools and Armor in any modpacks you create! I would highly appreciate it if your modpack uses Minecraft version 1.20.1, to keep up-to-date with the latest releases of BT+A! This mod is made using [**MCreator**](https://mcreator.net/). I am always open to feedback and suggestions. Please drop your thoughts in the comments and I will read them! Found any bugs? Please let me know in the comments, or by creating an Issue on the mod's [**GitHub**](https://github.com/BlackCat64/better_tools_and_armor_1.20.1) page. You can also view the source code here, but please don't re-release the mod without crediting me or linking back to this page! *** ## Planned Features * Port to 1.21 * More integration with Create **Not Planned:** * Any more versions for 1.16, 1.18, 1.19 or 1.20 * Backport to 1.15 or below * Fabric Port
